title: Sugar-Free Crispy Teff Stir-Fry
description: A tangy and chewy Ethiopian dish featuring ketchup to mimic the traditional spicy flavor without any added sugar.
instructions: In a bowl, mix teff flour with almond milk until smooth. Let it rest for 5 minutes.
Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and cook for about 1 minute.
Stir in the teff mixture and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium and simmer for about 3-4 minutes, stirring occasionally until thickened.
Add chopped onion and red bell pepper to the pan. Cook for another 5-7 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper as needed. Add finely chopped green onions on top before serving.
Serve hot with a side of vegan butter sauce (optional).
